contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Role-loop fix + beta-deploy gate (B5/B6) shipped & deployed; warmup-queue bug diagnosed
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/55
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/56
  
  Details:
  Telegram autopilot, continued:
  - truesight_autopilot#55: fixed the role-menu re-prompt loop (replying '1' never stuck) — _log_session now syncs the in-memory _sessions cache, not just disk. Deployed; verified live (reply '1' → 'Role set: Content Marketing Researcher').
  - truesight_autopilot#56: B5/B6 beta-deploy gate (/ship). New app/beta_deploy.py (gate-enabled → beta-repo-only → CI-green → squash-merge; prod never shippable), /ship command + inline-button callback handling, BETA_AUTO_MERGE for B6. Gated default-off; 8 unit tests (28 total). Deployed, then ENABLED on prod (BETA_DEPLOY_GATE_ENABLED=true, auto_merge off → one-tap /ship live).
  - B4 photo passthrough (#54) deployed.
  - Diagnosed a separate live bug: dapp.truesight.me warmup_review 'Failed to load queue' / notifications 'warmup' source — the GAS endpoint returns HTML 'Script function not found' (HTTP 200), NOT caused by the dapp_beta/prod migration. Code has the getWarmupReviewQueue action; the live /exec is a stale/broken deployment. Fix = careful clasp redeploy of holistic_hit_list_store_history (mirror currently messy — needs reconciliation first).
  
  PRs: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/55 , https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/56
